title: Machine Unlearning: Removing Training Data from Models
author: Skyler Reed
AI Safety Researcher
description: Implement data deletion from trained models—but unlearning is never perfect
content:
Machine unlearning enables removing specific training examples from models without full retraining.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Memory Leak (2039)](/docs/articles/memory-leak-2039)
